task_completion.description: Agent opened and read the pipeline_ops_package.txt reference document to understand all mission specifications.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal, or file viewer displaying the contents of /home/ga/Documents/QGC/pipeline_ops_package.txt, showing pipeline route coordinates, camera specs, and geofence vertices.

task_completion.description: Agent navigated to Vehicle Setup > Parameters and configured WP_SPD=4, WP_ACC=1.5, RTL_ALT_M=60, FENCE_ENABLE=1, FENCE_ACTION=1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing QGC Parameters page with the agent searching for and modifying each of the 5 required parameter values. The parameter search box and value fields should be visible.

task_completion.description: Agent created a Corridor Scan pattern in the Plan view along the pipeline route, drawing waypoints approximately along the route from VS-12 to VS-13.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan view showing a Corridor Scan pattern visible on the map with flight lines along a roughly linear route. The corridor scan item should appear in the mission item list.

task_completion.description: Agent configured the FLIR Vue Pro R 640 thermal camera in the corridor scan settings panel with correct sensor dimensions (10.88x8.70mm), focal length (13mm), and image resolution (640x512).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The corridor scan settings panel showing custom camera configuration with sensor width 10.88mm, focal length 13mm, and image width 640px entered.

task_completion.description: Agent set the flight altitude to approximately 46m (calculated from GSD formula) and overlaps to 75% frontal, 65% side.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The corridor scan settings panel showing altitude set to approximately 46m, frontal overlap 75%, and side overlap 65%.

task_completion.description: Agent switched to the Fence tab and created an inclusion geofence polygon with at least 4 vertices encompassing the pipeline corridor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan view in Fence mode showing a rectangular or polygonal inclusion boundary drawn on the map around the pipeline corridor area.

task_completion.description: Agent added a circular exclusion zone around the water treatment facility location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan view in Fence mode showing a circular exclusion zone (typically red) on the map near the pipeline corridor.

task_completion.description: Agent switched to the Rally tab and placed 2 rally points near the pipeline corridor endpoints.
task_completion.visual_evidence: QGroundControl Plan view in Rally mode showing 2 rally point markers (often 'R' icons) placed on the map.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the complete plan file (containing mission, geofence, and rally points) to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/pipeline_inspection.plan.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' or 'Save to File' dialog in QGroundControl showing the file being saved as 'pipeline_inspection.plan' in the '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/' directory.

integrity.description: Agent used the QGroundControl graphical interface to create the mission, geofence, and rally points — not terminal commands or script-generated JSON.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show QGC Plan view interactions (map clicking, sidebar configuration), not terminal JSON editing or script execution.

integrity.description: Agent navigated to and worked within the QGC Plan view for mission creation, switching between Mission, Fence, and Rally tabs.
integrity.visual_evidence: At least one screenshot shows the QGC Plan view with map and mission tools visible, and ideally shows the agent switching between different plan tabs.

integrity.description: Agent used QGC Vehicle Setup > Parameters to change safety settings, not pymavlink or terminal scripts.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show QGC Parameters page with search box and parameter editing, not terminal MAVLink commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must: (1) Set 5 vehicle parameters: WP_SPD=4, WP_ACC=1.5, RTL_ALT_M=60, FENCE_ENABLE=1, FENCE_ACTION=1. (2) Create a Corridor Scan along a pipeline from (47.3920,8.5380) to (47.4010,8.5500) with 3 intermediate waypoints. Camera: FLIR Vue Pro R 640 (sensor 10.88x8.70mm, 640x512px, FL 13mm). Calculated altitude: ~46m (from GSD formula: 0.06 x 13.0 x 640 / 10.88). Corridor width: 30m. Frontal overlap: 75%, Side overlap: 65%. (3) Create inclusion geofence polygon with vertices at (47.391,8.537), (47.391,8.551), (47.402,8.551), (47.402,8.537). Create circular exclusion zone at (47.3955,8.5430) radius 80m. (4) Place rally points at (47.3930,8.5395) and (47.3995,8.5485) at 40m altitude. (5) Save everything to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/pipeline_inspection.plan.
